summary: Training Intake Wizard Frontend Testing (Phase 4-6) completed successfully. All UI components working correctly: TrainingIntakeWizard with 3-step flow, TrainingRequestDialog with training types selection, public TrainingUploadPage with error handling, and TrainingPage with enhanced status displays.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Training Intake Wizard frontend fully tested. All features working: (1) Training tab shows 'Upload & Scan' and 'Request Certs' buttons, (2) TrainingIntakeWizard opens with 3-step flow (Upload → Extract → Review), (3) TrainingRequestDialog shows 10 training types with checkboxes, due date input (default 14 days), custom message textarea, (4) Public TrainingUploadPage at /training/upload/:token handles invalid tokens with proper error message, (5) TrainingPage shows 5 stat cards including 'Awaiting Review' which is clickable.

training_tab_action_buttons.details: Both 'Upload & Scan' (data-testid='upload-training-cert-btn') and 'Request Certs' (data-testid='request-training-btn') buttons visible and clickable

training_intake_wizard.details: Dialog opens correctly with 3-step flow (Upload → Extract → Review), file upload area present, 'Upload & Extract' button present

training_request_dialog.details: Dialog opens with 11 checkboxes for training types, due days input (default 14), custom message textarea, 'Send Request' button present

public_training_upload_page.details: Route /training/upload/:token works, invalid token shows 'Link Expired' error with 'Return to Home' button

training_page_stat_cards.details: 5 stat cards present: Completed, Verified, Needs Renewal, Expired, Awaiting Review. Awaiting Review card has data-testid='awaiting-extraction-card'

training_page_filters.details: Filter buttons present: All Records, Expired, Needs Renewal, Valid

training_records_display.details: Training records display with status badges (expired, completed, etc.)

public_upload_page_error_handling: Error message: 'This link has expired. Please contact your administrator for a new link.'
